column2: BP0019 Number of Temporary Visa Holders in Australia
This is a statistical publication containing information on the number of Temporary visa holders in Australia (excluding Bridging Visa E holders).
Report is released monthly and covers each quarter from, as at 31 December 2011, to end of previous month at date of this release.
